9:T1413,<div class="question">
<p>In the circuit shown, the battery has an emf of 12 V and negligible internal resistance. Three identical resistors are connected as shown. The resistors each have a resistance of 10 Ω.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>The resistor L is removed. What is the change in potential at X?</p>
<p>A.  Increases by 2 V</p>
<p>B.  Decreases by 2 V</p>
<p>C.  Increases by 4 V</p>
<p>D.  Decreases by 4 V</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ1.20"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-2-heating-effect-of-electric-currents"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$9"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>B</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>The majority of HL candidates correctly determined the magnitude of the potential but determining the direction of the change was more problematic. More candidates (incorrectly) selected option A than the correct option B, reinforcing the importance of a conceptual understanding of circuits and potential change.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
